title: brachystelma praelongum subsp. thunbergii
intro: Brachystelma praelongum subsp. thunbergii is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachystelma praelongum subsp. thunbergii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or stems in hot water, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a paste or tincture.
